chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N.D- 685 of 2019 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.2553/2019 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 27.09.2023 Mr. Daim Hussain Bhanbhro associate of Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for Respondent No.5. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< This petition was filed on 19.04.2019, has not been pursued as required. No one is present today, no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
